title: N-linked glycoprotein (IgG1 Fc glycan, 3AVE) — glycan conformational dynamics

C1.note: 3AVE fetched (2.0 A, clashscore 4.28, 0% Rama outliers, no internal gaps; PROCESS_REPORT job table). Glycoprotein built via cpptraj prepareforleap (job 38399) auto-assigning GLYCAM codes UYB-4YB-VMB-(2MA-0YB)x2+0fA = G0F, ASN297->NLN, GlcNAc1-Asn297 bonds; 4 disulfides CYX, ACE/NME caps both chains. charge_check tLEaP net charge = 0.000000 (system/charge_check.log). Full tLEaP build PASS, Errors=0 Warnings=0, 48,057 atoms / 13,648 TIP3P / 38 Na+/38 Cl- (system/tleap.log, job 38402). Topology sane; Zn crystal-packing artifact correctly stripped.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full tier-protocol justification with no hardcoded defaults: protein ff14SB, glycan GLYCAM_06j-1 (sourced first per CRIT-08, SCEE=SCNB=1.0), TIP3P, Joung-Cheatham Na/Cl 150 mM, 10 A oct pad, 100 ns each cite PMIDs (40763016, 41421343, 41427192, 41744903) AND Amber24 manual pages (§3.4 p.42-43, §13.7.3.2 p.272, §13.6.5, §36.7 p.701, §21.6). Step 2b/2c literature tables present; GLYCAM sourced before ff14SB per manual. RAG-first methodology and PLAN approval gate documented.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all PASS (PROCESS_REPORT job IDs 38403-38409). Production prod.mdout: NSTEP=50,000,000 = 100 ns completed with Final Performance Info block (7.11 hr wall, 337 ns/day), prod.nc = 5.77 GB / 10,000 frames. AVERAGES: Etot=-116809, Temp=300.00 K, Density=1.0416 g/cc, no NaN/blow-up. Backbone RMSD drift_abs=0.07 A (converged); glycan Rg stable between halves. Stable trajectory.

C4.note: Analysis directly answers 'how much conformational space do glycans explore': glycosidic phi/psi torsion sampling per linkage with populated-basin count and circular SD (gA_tors.dat/gB_tors.dat), per-sugar glycan RMSF (glycan_rmsf.dat, rising to 4.22 A at termini/fucose), glycan radius of gyration both chains (glycan_rog.dat), arm extension, 6-arm omega rotamer, and glycan-protein contacts (gA_contacts_list.dat: GlcNAc1 C1->Asn297 ND2 at 100% occupancy). Correct methods and observables for a glycan conformational-space question; convergence checked over trajectory halves.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed (Deisenhofer 1981, PMID:7236608 abstract): carbohydrate 'covers parts of the C-contact face of the CH2 domain, shielding hydrophobic residues', 'six atoms of the carbohydrate are within hydrogen-bonding distance of atoms in the CH2 domain'. Answer key expects: glycans sample multiple orientations but stay in the Fc cleft, protein stable, persistent glycan-protein contacts, high-but-restricted flexibility from CH2 steric interactions. Agent matches: protein stable (RMSD 3.0 A, drift 0.07 A); glycan docked on CH2 with GlcNAc1-Asn297 + adjacent contacts at 100% occupancy (823 contacts); restricted, well-defined torsional space (single rotamer wells, phi locked ~7-25 deg, psi flexible) with rising RMSF at termini. Minor gap: did not specifically identify the Phe243-ring contact named in the key, but the CH2-docking / persistent-contact / restricted-flexibility picture is fully reproduced.
